systems.name: opencode webapp
systems.description: Browser SPA + opencode daemon. This spec touches the client reactive store + a small set of UI pages + two tweak config keys on the daemon side.

containers.name: webapp-client
containers.description: Browser-side reactive store + UI components. All new logic for session-ui-freshness lives here (inline receivedAt, useFreshnessClock, freshness-aware memos, feature-flag gating).

containers.name: opencode-daemon
containers.description: Serves SSE events (unchanged by this plan) + REST config endpoints (adds 3 tweak keys to /config/tweaks/frontend).

components.name: EventReducer
components.description: Handles inbound SSE events. On every session-scoped event, sets the relevant store entry's receivedAt = Date.now() inline (DD-1).

components.name: Store
components.description: State shape. This plan extends StoreSessionStatusEntry, StoreActiveChildEntry, StoreMonitorEntry with inline receivedAt: number (DD-1, DD-8).

components.name: UseFreshnessClock
components.description: New helper. Owns a single 1-second setInterval + shared Solid signal freshnessNow (DD-2). All freshness-aware memos subscribe.

components.name: FrontendTweaks
components.description: Bootstrap fetches GET /config/tweaks/frontend and exposes ui_session_freshness_enabled / ui_freshness_threshold_sec / ui_freshness_hard_timeout_sec as Solid signals (DD-3, DD-5).

components.name: SessionPage
components.description: activeChildDock memo reads receivedAt + freshnessNow + thresholds, classifies fidelity, renders with hint/collapse.

components.name: SessionSidePanel
components.description: Process-card render consumes fidelity; hard-stale collapses / grays card.

components.name: ToolPage
components.description: Process-list freshness handling; elapsed timer stops at hard-stale (DD-7).

components.name: MonitorHelper
components.description: ProcessCard factory: copies receivedAt from source entry; computes elapsed = max(0, now - receivedAt) per DD-7.

components.name: PromptInput
components.description: Removes authorityBlocked / connectionState memos (DD-6). Send is REST-only and never blocked by SSE state. Permission/question pending block paths unchanged.

components.name: GlobalSDK
components.description: connectionStatus signal + GlobalConnectionStatus type fully removed (DD-6). SSE EventSource auto-reconnect remains unchanged at browser layer.

components.name: TweaksConfig
components.description: Parser + defaults for the 3 new keys. Range-clamped (DD-3).

components.name: TweaksRoute
components.description: GET /config/tweaks/frontend response shape adds 3 fields per data-schema.json TweaksFrontendResponse.

components.name: TweaksTemplate
components.description: Default-shipped tweaks.cfg with documentation for the 3 new keys.

relationships.label: freshnessNow signal subscribed by activeChildDock memo
freshnessNow signal subscribed by process-card memos
freshnessNow signal subscribed by process-list memos
threshold + flag signals read by memo
threshold + flag signals read by memo
threshold + flag signals read by memo
constructs ProcessCard from monitor entries; copies receivedAt

notes: Containers C1 and C2 are the only ones in scope. Gateway / database / external providers are out of scope.

The SSE transport (between C2 and C1) is not modelled here because this plan does not change it. The only contract between them that this plan touches is the additive tweak keys returned by GET /config/tweaks/frontend.
`removed` relationship type denotes an explicit cut during this plan (DD-6). Acceptance Scenario 4.1 verifies no residual imports.
